Description: "Rename highlight query parameter to keywords in single-poster Draw Poster click handler."
Instruction: "Change q.append('highlight', activeHighlight) to q.append('keywords', activeHighlight) to match Python's CLI parser argument name."
ReplacementContent: "                        const activeHighlight = (canvasSelectedItem?.id === item.id) ? canvasHighlight : '';\n                        if (activeHighlight) q.append('keywords', activeHighlight);"
TargetContent: "                        const activeHighlight = (canvasSelectedItem?.id === item.id) ? canvasHighlight : '';\n                        if (activeHighlight) q.append('highlight', activeHighlight);"
toolAction: "Renaming highlight query param to keywords in button handler"
